raw.official description: Eject grants 75 temporary overhealth and Call Mech's damage radius is increased by 50%.
raw.ability details: * At the end of the duration, overhealth starts to decay at rate of 25/s.

raw.official description: Call Mech’s damage radius is increased by 50%.
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Bunny_Power.png|sub|link=D.Va#Bunny Power|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Bunny Power|Bunny Power]] in Season 16.

raw.official description: Eject out of your mech when it's destroyed.
raw.ability details: * D.Va can use ''Could not find 'Self-Destruct' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' while ejecting. * D.Va is [[invulnerable]] while ejecting for 1.8 seconds. * If D.Va falls off the map while still in her mech, she will be instantly eliminated. * D.Va is only able to crouch while in Pilot form; Mech form cannot crouch. * If using an [[emote]] while in Pilot form, D.Va will do a single emote unique to Pilot form rather than any selected emote.

* Replaced by [[File:Extended_Boosters.png|sub|link=D.Va#Extended Boosters|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Extended Boosters|Extended Boosters]] in Season 16. * At the end of the duration, overhealth starts to decay at rate of 25/s.

raw.official description: Hitting an enemy with Boosters deals 40% increased damage and extends the duration by 0.5 seconds.

raw.official description: Fly in the direction you are facing.
raw.ability details: * Can be used simultaneously with [[File:Ability-dva1.png|middle|link=D.Va#Fusion Cannons|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Fusion Cannons|Fusion Cannons]], quick melee, ''Could not find 'Micro Missiles' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', and/or [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]]. * Does not affect Fusion Cannons or Micro Missiles accuracy. Although reticles with the 'show accuracy' option enabled suggest a spread increase when using the Boosters, it is a purely cosmetic change. * Boosters [[movement speed]] is unaffected by gravity, but is affected by [[slow]]ing effects. * Boosters movement speed buff doesn't count towards global movement speed buff cap.

raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 82.5 while firing * Deals up to a total of 135 damage with direct hits. * Cannot be manually cancelled. * If the ability is interrupted before the end of the casting time, the cooldown will not start. * The projectile can be destroyed while in midair by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the splash is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

raw.official description: Block projectiles in an area in front of you.
raw.duration:
0.5 seconds (min)
3 seconds (max)
0.75 seconds (energy regen delay)
raw.ability details: * D.Va cannot fire [[File:Ability-dva1.png|middle|link=D.Va#Fusion Cannons|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Fusion Cannons|Fusion Cannons]] or use quick melee while channeling Defense Matrix. * Can be used simultaneously with ''Could not find 'Boosters' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' and ''Could not find 'Micro Missiles' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. * Defense Matrix has a resource meter which depletes while it is active and recharges when not in use. ** The meter takes 6 seconds to recharge from 0% to 100%. * The following interactions cannot be negated: ** Strong projectiles: [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]], [[File:Pummel_Icon.png|middle|link=Ramattra#Pummel|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Pummel|Pummel]], [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|sub|link=Sigma#Accretion|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Accretion|Accretion]], [[File:Grappling_claw.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Grappling Claw|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Grappling Claw|Grappling Claw]], [[File:Minefield.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Minefield|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Minefield|Minefield]], [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]], [[File:Ability Sombra Translocator.png|sub|link=Sombra#Translocator|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Translocator|Translocator]], [[File:Ability-symmetra2.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Sentry Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Sentry Turret|Sentry Turret]], [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Deploy Turret]], [[File:Baptiste-ability3.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Immortality Field|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Immortality Field|Immortality Field]], [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]], [[File:Whip Shot.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Whip Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Whip Shot|Whip Shot]], [[File:Ability-Juno5.png|sub|link=Juno#Hyper Ring|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Juno#Hyper Ring|Hyper Ring]], [[File:Ability Binding Chain.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Binding Chain|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Binding Chain|Binding Chain]] and [[File:Anchor Drone.png|sub|link=Sierra#Anchor Drone|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Anchor Drone|Anchor Drone]]. ** Attacks classified as Beam, Melee, Shockwave or Area of Effect. *** Abilities that create an AoE or leave a deployable, but travel as a projectile can be blocked before they land. * Changing the direction of the character's gaze (and hence the matrix zone) takes time. It takes ~0.14 seconds to be able to matrix something that was exactly behind you.

abilities.name: Call Mech
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.cast time: 0.9 + 2 seconds
raw.ability details: * Enemies hit by Call Mech take damage and are [[knocked back]]. * Becomes completely charged after [[File:Ability-dva4.png|sub|link=D.Va#Self-Destruct|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Self-Destruct|Self-Destruct]] detonates, or if D.Va is [[File:Ability-mercy5.png|sub|link=Mercy#Resurrect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mercy#Resurrect|Resurrected]]. * Has to be grounded to activate. * Call Mech can be interrupted during its cast if D.Va is [[stunned]], [[knocked down]], or [[hacked]], including subsidiary effects, consuming the ultimate charge. * Entering the mech will allow D.Va to escape [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]]; however, it must be activated beforehand, as the ability will be disabled once Gravitic Flux takes effect. * D.Va cannot be pulled by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]] during Call Mech. *It is possible to gain massive ultimate charge from [[File:Ability-dva2.png|sub|link=D.Va#Boosters|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Boosters|Boosters]] with [[environmental kill]] before mech destroyed.

abilities.name: Self-Destruct
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Eject and overload your mech, causing it to explode after a short time.
raw.cast time: 0 + 0.13 seconds
raw.ability details: * Enemies hit by the explosion are also [[knocked back]]. * If Self-Destruct was activated while [[File:Ability-dva2.png|sub|link=D.Va#Boosters|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Boosters|Boosters]] were on, they will remain active for their remaining duration. ** The moving mech can be stopped by any ability that would interrupt Boosters. * Automatically reloads the [[File:Ability-dva5.png|middle|link=D.Va#Light Gun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Light Gun|Light Gun]]. * Using Self-Destruct allows (pilot) D.Va to escape [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]], leaving the exploding mech in the suspension. * [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]] cannot be used on the exploding mech.
